suite.name: testeT35 visual

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Cache folder (C:\Users\eduardo.barros\.cache\selenium) cannot be created: Acesso negado. (os error 5)
Cache folder (C:\Users\eduardo.barros\.cache\selenium) cannot be created: Acesso negado. (os error 5)
Cache folder (C:\Users\eduardo.barros\.cache\selenium) cannot be created: Acesso negado. (os error 5)
Cache folder (C:\Users\eduardo.barros\.cache\selenium) cannot be created: Acesso negado. (os error 5)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

test.name: CT01 - T35: Idoso com restricao ve apenas rotinas sem conflito de contraindicacao

kw.name: Realizar Login Como Idoso
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain '/dashboard' in 15 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/dashboard' in 15 seconds.
Location did not contain '/dashboard' in 15 seconds.

test.doc: RN01 + RN03 — Usuário antonio2 tem limitacao_fisica 'antonio nas costas'. Rotinas SEDENTARIO no banco possuem exercicios com contraindicacoes = null (sem risco). Resultado Esperado: Rotinas EXIBIDAS pois nao ha conflito entre 'costas' e null.
test.status: Setup failed: Location did not contain '/dashboard' in 15 seconds.

test.name: CT02 - T35: Idoso ATIVO_LEVE sem restricao real ve rotinas do perfil

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=FALHA RN01: Esperava rotinas do perfil ATIVO_LEVE para usuario sem restricoes conflitantes.
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: RN01 — Usuário antonio0 tem perfil ATIVO_LEVE e limitacoes_fisicas = '{}'. Resultado Esperado: Rotinas do perfil ATIVO_LEVE sao exibidas normalmente.

test.name: CT03 - T35: Secao Recomendados e renderizada corretamente no Dashboard

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: VALIDADO: Secao de recomendados renderizou corretamente no Dashboard do Idoso.
kw.arg: VALIDADO: Secao de recomendados renderizou corretamente no Dashboard do Idoso.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Teste de Sanidade — Verifica que a estrutura do Dashboard do Idoso esta correta e a secao Recomendados e exibida apos o login.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc:
Suite de testes de interface para o T35 — Exibição de Restrição por Condição (RN01 e RN03). Foco: Validar que o Dashboard do Idoso exibe apenas rotinas compatíveis com as limitações físicas do usuário. Responsável: Henrique Medeiros
Regras de Negócio testadas: RN01: O sistema deve filtrar exercícios com base no perfil clínico do usuário. RN03: Se o usuário possui uma limitação física que coincide com a contraindicação de qualquer exercício em uma rotina, essa rotina deve ser OCULTADA.
